message:
refactor(rpc): optimize session state reads and expose AbortSignal::wait

Two small improvements to the RPC server:

1. RPC session lock reduction (rpc.rs):
   The get_session_state and get_session_stats handlers previously acquired
   two nested locks: outer RpcSession lock then inner Session lock. Since
   these handlers only need the inner Session, clone the session Arc upfront
   and skip the outer lock. This reduces lock contention during concurrent
   RPC requests and eliminates a potential deadlock path.

2. AbortSignal::wait visibility (agent.rs):
   Changed AbortSignal::wait from private to pub so it can be used by the
   RPC Ctrl+C shutdown path (run_rpc_mode) and other callers that need to
   await the abort signal outside the agent module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
